creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
I need to dig into this more.  I noted that on ARM building with poudriere + qemu where I set CC=/nxb-bin/usr/bin/cc there was a lot of qemu emulation going on as the build was still using /usr/bin/cc or "clang".

http://tasty.ysv.freebsd.org/data/11armv6-11-armv6-ports/2015-01-16_17h12m26s/logs/mplayer-1.1.r20141223.log
